you,

yeah, it will be very special.

well.

Have you guys seen the same across your portfolio as well or have things been pretty consistent?

No, I mean, definitely we've seen and I've, yeah, we've definitely seen it and I think, um, you know, leadership is starting to understand um kind of the, the loss of leads that we are getting because we don't have someone who is online and able to ask your answer your question at 2 a.m. when, you know, a lot of people like to be looking for apartments.
So I think that's a big reason why we're looking towards like a chat bot uh of sorts because we have the knock bot.
But it's, it's not very like, you know, it kind of has like parameters and restrictions around like what it can answer for you.
Whereas we want a very like knowledgeable intuitive, but that can answer anyone's questions from pet fees to, um, you know.
Yeah, I don't know, just pretty much like across the board, we want them, we want the renter to have a full experience outside of the 9 to 5 hours when we have a dedicated person.
Got you.
Ok.
Well, that kind of like dip and leads then.
How have you guys been seeing occupancy wise?
Yeah.
Um I mean across our portfolio, we're sitting at about like 94% occupancy.
So it's pretty good but not too bad.
Yeah, we're, we are, we are struggling though with um some of our, our new properties, new market rate properties for sure.

Um,
but I mean, as a marketing professional at the, the company, my job is to bring in leads and leads have been pretty steady.

typically a slower time of the year.

I think like
we're, we're staying on top of it and like trying to get creative with how
we can, you know, just get our buildings full as quick as possible.

I hear you.

Um So essentially what we've launched is it's a first of its kind of A I model to help you reach about 80% of all online renters across the board.

So kind of the process behind where we kind of came from.

We've been seeing a lot of things kind of go back to pre COVID times.

And now it's kind of you have to put in a little bit more work now to help get some of those leases filled here.

And we just kind of start that cycle all over again.

Any bells sound familiar to you?
Yeah.

So essentially what we want to do is first of all, we'd create your listing for your properties through our rentable site, our kind of proprietary listing site, which even compared to other listing sites to see about a 40% growth year over year where most sites are about down 20% nationally.

For example, we try to really target kind of high intent buyers.

So we partner with nine of the 10 of the top 10 listing sites.

Uh But all the other major ones we do have direct partnerships with, we get your listings out to an extremely wide audience.
